test.name: Test Login With Valid Credentials

kw.name: Open BookAd Website
kw.doc: Opens the BookAd website in the browser

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Implicit Wait
kw.doc: Sets the implicit wait value used by Selenium.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Navigate To Login Page
kw.doc: Navigates to the login page

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
kw.msg: Clicking element '//a[contains(text(), 'เข้าสู่ระบบ')] | //button[contains(text(), 'เข้าสู่ระบบ')] | //*[@id='login'] | //*[contains(@class, 'login')]'.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.
kw.msg: Element '//form[contains(@class, 'login')] | //*[@id='login-form'] | //div[contains(@class, 'login-form')]' did not appear in 2 seconds.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Login With Credentials
kw.doc: Performs login with provided credentials

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait For Email Input
kw.doc: Waits for email/username input field and stores the found locator

kw.name: Create List
kw.arg: //input[contains(@placeholder, 'email') or contains(@placeholder, 'Email') or contains(@placeholder, 'อีเมล')]
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Set Test Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current test.

kw.name: Return From Keyword If
kw.doc: Returns from the enclosing user keyword if ``condition`` is true.
kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Return From Keyword
kw.doc: Returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: Email/Username input field not found. Please check the login page structure.
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait For Password Input
kw.doc: Waits for password input field and stores the found locator

kw.name: Create List
kw.arg: //input[contains(@placeholder, 'password') or contains(@placeholder, 'Password') or contains(@placeholder, 'รหัสผ่าน')]
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Set Test Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current test.

kw.name: Return From Keyword If
kw.doc: Returns from the enclosing user keyword if ``condition`` is true.
kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Return From Keyword
kw.doc: Returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: Password input field not found. Please check the login page structure.
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait For Submit Button
kw.doc: Waits for submit button and stores the found locator

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.
kw.msg: ${locators} = ["//button[@type='submit']", "//button[contains(text(), 'เข้าสู่ระบบ')]", "//button[contains(text(), 'Login')]", "//button[contains(text(), 'Sign in')]", "//button[contains(text(), 'Log in')]", "//but...

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Return From Keyword If
kw.doc: Returns from the enclosing user keyword if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Set Test Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current test.

kw.name: Return From Keyword If
kw.doc: Returns from the enclosing user keyword if ``condition`` is true.
kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Return From Keyword
kw.doc: Returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: Submit button not found. Please check the login page structure.
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Element Should Be Enabled
kw.doc: Verifies that element identified by ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.arg: Submit button is disabled - form validation preventing submission (expected for empty credentials)
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
kw.msg: Clicking element '//button[contains(text(), 'เข้าสู่ระบบ')]'.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Verify Login Success
kw.doc: Verifies that login was successful by checking multiple conditions quickly

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.arg: Wait Until Page Does Not Contain Element
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Does Not Contain Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` disappears from the current page.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Return From Keyword
kw.doc: Returns from the enclosing user keyword.
kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.arg: เข้าสู่ระบบ
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Get Location
kw.doc: Returns the current browser window URL.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.arg: 'login' not in '${current_url}'.lower() and 'เข้าสู่ระบบ' not in '${current_url}'
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Should Not Be True
kw.arg: Login form is still visible. Login may have failed.
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is true.

kw.name: Run Keywords
kw.doc: Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

kw.name: Take Screenshot On Failure
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot when a test fails

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Close BookAd Website
kw.doc: Closes the browser

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

test.doc: Test login with valid username and password

test.name: Test Login With Invalid Credentials

kw.name: Open BookAd Website
kw.doc: Opens the BookAd website in the browser

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Implicit Wait
kw.doc: Sets the implicit wait value used by Selenium.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.doc: Navigates to the login page

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
kw.msg: Clicking element '//a[contains(text(), 'เข้าสู่ระบบ')] | //button[contains(text(), 'เข้าสู่ระบบ')] | //*[@id='login'] | //*[contains(@class, 'login')]'.

kw.msg: Clicking element '//button[contains(text(), 'เข้าสู่ระบบ')]'.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Verify Login Failed
kw.doc: Verifies that login failed by checking for error modal/message or disabled submit button

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Return From Keyword
kw.doc: Returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.arg: The email or password provided is incorrect
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.arg: ${error_modal_visible} or ${error_message_visible} or ${error_text_visible} or ${error_text_partial} or ${error_text_incorrect} or ${validation_visible} or ${validation_visible_thai} or ${button_disabled}
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: Expected error message, validation, or disabled button not found. Login may have succeeded or error message format changed.
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Run Keywords
kw.doc: Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

kw.name: Take Screenshot On Failure
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot when a test fails

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Close BookAd Website
kw.doc: Closes the browser

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

test.doc: Test login with invalid username and password
